prompt: Create an ultra-realistic candid smartphone flash photo in a messy dim apartment at night, vertical 9:16 framing, low-end Android camera look with harsh direct flash, motion blur, imperfect autofocus, grain, compression artifacts, awkward tilted composition, and raw chaotic party energy. The scene shows exactly two young adults and one black-and-white cat: on the left, a young adult with silver-gray messy shoulder-length hair wearing an oversized off-white T-shirt and light gray sweatpants, recoiling and twisting away with one arm stretched forward; on the right, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a pale T-shirt and denim shorts, barefoot, leaning forward while holding the cat. The cat is suspended between them, black-and-white tuxedo markings, mouth wide open hissing or yowling, claws gripping the left person’s forearm, creating a frantic accidental moment. Add large rectangular privacy blocks obscuring both human faces, as if posted online with identities hidden. The background is cluttered and realistic: a low table with cans, cups, bottles, snacks and trash, scattered objects on the floor, slippers near the bottom, warm dark interior lighting, doorway and furniture fading into shadow. Make it look like a badly timed real phone snapshot rather than a polished photo, with blown flash highlights, smeared movement, off-center cropping, and a sense that the photographer reacted too late.
